ground_truth.title: Nike Pegasus 41 Men's Road Running Shoes
ground_truth.main_content:
Nike Pegasus 41

Men's Road Running Shoes

This product is made with at least 20% recycled content by weight

Shown: Black/Anthracite/White
Style: FD2722-002

Springy foam plus snappy Air Zoom units equals our most energized ride.

Responsive cushioning in the Pegasus provides an energized ride for everyday road running. Experience lighter-weight energy return with dual Air Zoom units and a ReactX foam midsole. Plus, improved engineered mesh on the upper decreases weight and increases breathability.

Responsive Ride
ReactX foam midsole surrounds forefoot and heel Air Zoom units for an energized ride. It's 13% more responsive than previous React technology.

Waffle-Inspired Traction
Signature waffle-inspired rubber outsole provides traction and flexibility.

Plush Padding
Plush collar, tongue and sockliner provide a secure and comfortable fit.

What's New?
ReactX foam midsole
Lighter, more breathable engineered mesh upper

Product Details

Weight: Approx. 297g/10.5oz (Men's US 10)
Heel-to-toe drop: 10mm
MR-10 Last - Our best, most consistent fit (same as Pegasus 40)
Reflective details
Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)
with: Springy foam plus snappy Air Zoom units equals our most energized ride.
